steps.title: Identify the clue about the nose
steps.content: The passage calls the nose delicate and says it sticks out, making it especially easy to break.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Fragile means easily broken, which fits the clue that the nose is delicate and breaks easily.
The other choices either describe something not mentioned or imply strength rather than delicacy.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
